query: Install Volcano on my Together AI Kubernetes cluster and run a gang-scheduled multi-node training job.
My distributed training on a Together cluster keeps starting some workers while others stay pending. I need all pods scheduled together or none.
Create a Volcano queue and a vcjob that requests 8 GPUs with minAvailable on Together AI.
I want to share my Together cluster's GPUs across teams by quota and have jobs wait in a queue until capacity is free.

Generate an image with FLUX on Together AI.
